# Vishal Tyagi — vishalxtyagi.in

> Software Developer / Software Engineer based in Hyderabad, Telangana, India.
> Currently at Runo: product analytics, Amplitude instrumentation, hybrid telephony,
> CRM integrations, and admin-platform engineering.

## About

Product-minded software engineer working across analytics, telephony, integrations, admin platforms, Flutter/web, automation, and infrastructure-adjacent systems.

Contact: vishaltyagi.sde@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/vishalxtyagi
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/vishalxtyagi

## What makes this engineer distinct

- Can translate engineering implementation into product, analytics, and business context.
- Current work shows depth in product analytics, event taxonomy, Amplitude integration, user/company traits, and analytics accuracy.
- Has hands-on exposure across Flutter/mobile, web, backend, automation, cloud hosting, CRM/integration workflows, and IoT/industrial automation.
- Has built practical systems for colleges, SaaS/product companies, NGOs, government/event workflows, e-commerce, and education platforms.
- Has several automation examples, including OMR processing at 90,000+ sheet scale.
- Global Rank 371 in TCS CodeVita Season 11
- Python OMR automation script processed over 90,000 sheets

- Product Engineer
- Software Engineer - Product Analytics
- Full-stack Software Engineer
- Frontend/Product Engineer with Flutter/Web depth

## Portfolio projects (knowledge base)

- **AI-Powered Financial Chatbot** — Financial-report chatbot/NLP system; related LinkedIn role references Morningstar documentation chatbot deployed on AWS Lightsail. · repo: vishalxtyagi-morningstar-pdf-chatbot
- **Automated Report Downloader** — Automation for downloading and organizing reports from web portals. · repo: yespiet-python-feedback-downloader
- **Blockchain-Based NGO Donation Tracking** — Blockchain platform for transparent NGO donations and payouts. · repo: vishalxtyagi-ngo-minor-project
- **Crickiaa** — Flutter UI app for gully cricket match management and scorekeeping. · repo: vishalxtyagi-crickiaa-dev
- **CSXIIP School Management System** — Low-code school management GUI that dynamically creates tables, forms, and CRUD operations from DB schema. · repo: vishalxtyagi-csxiip
- **ENTHRAL.IN Product Data Change Detection Tool** — Supplier scraping and comparison workflow to update OpenCart product listings/prices using margin rules. · repo: vishalxtyagi-enthral-scraped-data-changes-detector
- **EvalSheet** — Automated handwritten answer checker with test creation, OCR answer extraction, and similarity-based grading. · repo: vishalxtyagi-evalsheet
- **Floor Plan Builder** — Flutter package for interactive floor plans with customizable tables. · repo: vishalxtyagi-floor-plan-builder
- **GMSSSS Laravel School Website** — School website with dynamic pages, navigation, role management, shared-hosting deployment helper, and error handling. · repo: vishalxtyagi-gmsssschulkana
- **Hopfield Network Visualization** — Learning project with interactive Hopfield Network visualizations; note that it was created with AI assistance per GitHub summary. · repo: vishalxtyagi-hopfield-network-viz
- **HTML Content Translator** — Script that translates text inside HTML while preserving tags. · repo: vishalxtyagi-html-files-translator-using-python
- **image_hotspot Flutter Package** — Flutter package for defining interactive clickable hotspot areas on images. · repo: vishalxtyagi-flutter-image-hotspot
- **Laravel Queue Worker for Shared Hosting** — Node.js script enabling Laravel queue workers in shared hosting environments where background processes are limited. · repo: vishalxtyagi-nodejs-laravel-queue-runner
- **My Dua App** — Ramadan-focused app redesign with music playback and religious features. · repo: vishalxtyagi-my-dua-app
- **NMOLD Inventory Management Redevelopment** — Redeveloped inventory management using Flutter, Express, and MongoDB, replacing older Python/Laravel stack and adding image recognition. · repo: vishalxtyagi-nmolds
- **NO-CODE ML Environment** — Web-based no-code machine-learning pipeline environment. · repo: vishalxtyagi-no-code-ml
- **OMR Sheet Reading Automation** — Python automation script for OMR sheet reading that processed over 90,000 sheets. · repo: vishalxtyagi-omr-scanner
- **PHP Ghost Wall** — Laravel package for code-integrity monitoring, tamper alerts, and server information on boot. · repo: vishalxtyagi-php-ghost-wall
- **PIET Quest Exam Portal** — Exam portal with cheating detection, randomized question sets, and dynamic question ordering.
- **Real-time Location Tracker** — Live location sharing app with interactive map. · repo: vishalxtyagi-realtime-location-tracker
- **Runo Admin Web Migration / Admin Platform Workflows** — Admin Web Flutter migration work involving reusable components, integration dialogs, bulk uploads, deletion workflows, templates, validation, and loading states.
- **Runo Hybrid Telephony** — Hybrid GSM/cloud calling flows with call-medium selection, virtual-number assignment, call logs, analytics filters, and permissions.
- **Runo Product Analytics / Amplitude System** — Product analytics infrastructure and instrumentation across authentication, billing, CRM, templates, allocations, filters, and product workflows.
- **Skill Matrix LMS** — LMS workflow for translating educational videos by extracting audio, generating subtitles, translating, and recombining media. · repo: vishalxtyagi-skill-matrix-lms
- **Smart Irrigation IoT** — NodeMCU/sensor-based smart irrigation app with Flutter visualization and SVM-based irrigation forecasting. · repo: vishalxtyagi-smart-irrigation-iot
- **TrueShot** — Image validator API using face-api.js and TensorFlow.js. · repo: vishalxtyagi-trueshot

## Skill areas

- **ai ml and nlp** — Scikit-learn, HuggingFace sentence-transformers, LlamaIndex RAG, TensorFlow.js, OpenAI Whisper, and NLP chatbots across academic and portfolio projects
- **analytics and product data** — Amplitude instrumentation, event taxonomy design, user/company traits, funnel and retention tracking — primary Runo production work
- **automation and data processing** — Selenium, OMR sheet processing at 90k+ scale, OCR, ETL pipelines, bulk data workflows, and PDF generation
- **backend and web** — Node.js, Laravel, Django, Flask, Next.js — REST APIs, webhooks, full-stack web apps, and backend services across multiple stacks
- **blockchain** — Solidity, Ethereum, Truffle, Web3.js, Web3.py — donation transparency and on-chain workflow projects
- **cloud devops and infra** — Linux, Docker, AWS, GCP, DigitalOcean, Alibaba Cloud — server deployment and hosting across projects
- **databases and storage** — SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Hive, and Appwrite across projects and production systems
- **frontend and mobile** — Flutter, Flutter Web, React, and responsive admin dashboard development across mobile and web
- **integrations** — Facebook/Meta, WABA, OAuth, HubSpot, Zoho, Salesforce, and payment gateway integrations for SaaS CRM workflows
- **iot and industrial** — NodeMCU, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, Siemens/Delta PLCs, and OPC UA — IoT sensors and industrial automation
- **languages** — Core programming languages: Dart, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, PHP, SQL, Bash, and Java
- **telephony and crm** — Hybrid cloud/GSM telephony, virtual number assignment, call analytics, and CRM data configuration at Runo

## Career / clients

- **ACHIEVERS (Startup)** — Student achievement social platform; Flutter mobile development for peer networking and academic progress tracking
- **CURESURE (Startup)** — Healthcare SaaS startup; 6-month software development role on a hospital management system
- **Digitaxperts** — Web development agency; Laravel client sites (awards shows, insurance, institutes) and server/DNS/hosting recovery work
- **Emailwish** — Shopify email automation SaaS; 1-month contract on Laravel backend and React frontend chat widget
- **ENTHRAL.IN** — Electronics/CCTV e-commerce site; built a supplier-scraping price-automation tool and fixed OpenCart functionality
- **EQUALITYMUST STUDIOS** — Freelance Android and web development studio; shipped a news aggregator app, a rentals platform, and a classifieds site
- **Geoms Digital House Pvt. Ltd.** — Digital agency; Panipat Marathon 2024 registration site (with govt. collaboration), Next.js/MongoDB inventory portal fixes
- **HtK Network** — IT company; blockchain and web development alongside DevOps automation (Jenkins, Terraform) and OMR automation at 90k+ sheet scale
- **INCITE GROUP** — MNC environment; Python OMR automation at 90k+ sheet scale, DevOps practices with Jenkins/Terraform, international client onboarding
- **Infosys Springboard** — Infosys's free digital-skills learning platform; career-entry training, not a traditional employment role
- **Milano Web Agency** — Web hosting agency; 14-month contract managing Plesk panels, DNS, server setups, and cybersecurity measures across client environments
- **Minksha** — Milk-delivery startup; 2-month frontend contract building the consumer-facing web UI
- **NAUKRICART (Startup)** — Construction-sector job portal; two-sided marketplace for job listings and equipment rental
- **NMOLD (OPC) PRIVATE LIMITED** — Manufacturing company; led Flutter+Express+MongoDB inventory rebuild, IoT poultry monitoring, OPC UA/Node-RED PLC data streaming
- **Panipat Institute of Engineering and Technology** — PIET college; student portals, PIET Quest exam platform with cheating detection, HDFC-integrated ticketing, automation scripts
- **PEHLAPANNA** — News platform startup; cloud operations for AWS Lightsail migration and hosting cost optimization
- **PIXOVA STUDIOS / Versioning Solution** — Web agency; CodeIgniter property listing site maintenance, Node.js portal development
- **Profusion Creatives LLP** — Web agency; Laravel development for rummy platform, pharma site, awards show, and music streaming startup
- **RGC Engineering Solutions** — Engineering firm; Flutter work (My Dua prayer app redesign, attendance app) and ML engineering stint
- **Runo** — CRM and telephony SaaS (current employer); product analytics instrumentation, hybrid telephony, admin platform, CRM/lead-source integrations
- **TechMarshal Software Pvt. Ltd.** — IT company; PHP maintenance for Techmarshal website and RupayRummy client site
- **VISION Foundation** — NGO/education; built Laravel exam module for Vidya Darshini IAS prep platform

- **flexiblecampus** — Education-platform org (PIET context) — Laravel/Filament starter kit for campus admin workflows
- **haloyte** — Startup org — Flutter mobile app (sarvdharm) and supporting infrastructure repos; early-stage product work across mobile and DevOps
- **profusioncreatives** — Web agency client org — PHP/Laravel sites for awards shows, e-commerce, and brand campaigns delivered as production deployments
- **vishalxtyagi** — Personal GitHub account — 123 repos spanning college projects, freelance client work, open-source packages, and product prototypes across PHP/Laravel, Flutter, Python, and Node.js
- **wirecept** — Product-company org — contributions to Manifest (open-source manufacturing ERP for factory floors), CloudPilot serverless infra, and a shared Flutter core package
- **yespiet** — YesPIET — institutional GitHub org for PIET (Pragya Institute of Engineering and Technology); campus management portals, event registration systems, and student-facing tools

## Repo domain clusters

- **AI / ML / Data Automation** — 27 repos across OMR sheet automation, fraud detection, NLP chatbots, IoT prediction, and bulk data workflows — spans academic projects to production tools
- **Business / SaaS / Inventory / Finance** — 21 repos spanning inventory management, money-manager apps, and SaaS prototypes — mix of shipped client software and product experiments
- **Campus / Education Operations** — 33 repos across gate-pass systems, bus-route trackers, student portals, and campus admin tools — the largest single domain cluster
- **Events / Registration / Ticketing** — 12 repos for live events: marathon ticketing, cultural-fest portals, convocation check-in, and award-show registration — most shipped for real events
- **Infrastructure / DevOps / Tooling** — 15 repos for server provisioning, CI/CD, Docker deployments, and developer tooling across personal and startup (Haloyte, Wirecept) contexts
- **Learning / Utilities / Experiments** — 12 repos of FreeCodeCamp projects, LeetCode solutions, and short utility scripts — low-signal for a portfolio but part of the full commit history
- **Mobile / Flutter Apps and Packages** — 16 Flutter repos including a pub.dev package, a prayer-times app, a real-time location tracker, and a sports-score feed
- **Unclear / Low-Signal Repo** — 21 repos with minimal commits or unclear purpose — test scaffolds, renamed forks, and archived stubs that don't represent active work
- **Websites / CMS / Client Delivery** — 24 repos — PHP/Laravel client sites, CMS deployments, and brand microsites delivered for schools, NGOs, and small businesses
